pick.rationale: SMU holds a substantial advantage in efficiency metrics, ranking 42nd in both KenPom and Torvik compared to Miami (OH)'s 87th-93rd range, reflecting the significant gap between ACC and MAC competition levels. While SMU has dealt with BJ Edwards missing the last five games due to injury, they demonstrated the ability to compete without him by defeating Syracuse in the ACC Tournament. Miami (OH) enters off their first-ever loss after a remarkable 31-0 start, which could impact momentum, and their weaker strength of schedule makes their impressive record less predictive against a power-conference opponent.
